---
title: "Schedule"
format: 
  html:
    css: schedule.css
editor: visual
---

+---------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Wk      | Dates        | Mon                                                                                                                    | Tue                                                                    | Wed                                                                                         | Thu                                                                 | Fri                                                                                                                         |

| 1       | Jan 12-15    | [Welcome]{.lecture}                                                                                                    | [Lab 1]{.lab}                                                          | [Lecture 2]{.lab}                                                                           | [Lab 2]{.lab}                                                       | [Lecture 2]{.lecture}                                                                                                       |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              | Syllabus                                                                                                               | [Introduction to R and RStudio](../labs/introduction-to-r-and-rstudio) | [Data and Variables](../lectures/slides/lecture-02-data-and-variables)                      | [Workflow and Data Types](../labs/workflow-and-data-types)          | continued                                                                                                                   |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              | [Lecture 1]{.lecture}                                                                                                  |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              | [Statistics and Samples](../lectures/slides/lecture-01-statistics-samples)                                             |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
+---------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 2       | Jan 19-23    | [No Class]{.noclass}                                                                                                   | [Lab 3]{.lab}                                                          | [Lecture 3]{.lab}                                                                           | [Lab 4]{.lab}                                                       | [Lecture 4]{.lecture}                                                                                                       |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              | *Martin Luther King Holiday*                                                                                           | [Importing Data](../labs/importing-data)                               | [Effective data visualization](../lectures/slides/lecture-03-effective-data-visualization/) | [Graphing with ggplot](../labs/graphing-ggplot)                     | [Visualizing data types](../lectures/slides/lecture-04-visualizing-data-types/)                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     | ::: {.alert .alert-info}                                                                                                    |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     | **Update.** Class was cancelled due to weather.                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     | :::                                                                                                                         |
+---------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 3       | Jan 26-30    | [Lecture 4]{.lecture}                                                                                                  | [Lab 5]{.lab}                                                          | [Lecture 5]{.lab}                                                                           | [Project]{.lab}                                                     | [Lecture 5]{.lab}                                                                                                           |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              | [Visualizing data types](../lectures/slides/lecture-04-visualizing-data-types/)                                        | [ggplot2 Visualization Challenge](../labs/ggplot2-vis-challenge)       | [Describing Data](../lectures/slides/lecture-05-describing-data/)                           | Activity: [Introduction to the EDA Project](../project/index.qmd)   | continued.                                                                                                                  |
+---------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 4       | Feb 2-6      | [Lecture 6]{.lab}                                                                                                      | [Project]{.lab}                                                        | [Lecture 7]{.lab}                                                                           | [Lab 6]{.lab}                                                       | [Lecture 7]{.lab}                                                                                                           |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              | [Estimating with uncertainty](../lectures/slides/lecture-06-uncertainty/)                                              | ::: {.alert .alert-warning}                                            | [Probability](../lectures/slides/lecture-07-probability/)                                   | [Describing data with summary statistics](../labs/describing-data/) | continued.                                                                                                                  |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        | **Due on D2L.**                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        | [Team Formation](../project/team-formation.qmd)                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        | :::                                                                    |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
+---------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 5       | Feb 9-14     | [Exam 1]{.exam}                                                                                                        | [Project]{.lab}                                                        | [Lecture 8]{.lab}                                                                           | [Project]{.lab}                                                     | [Lecture 9]{.lab}                                                                                                           |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              | Lectures 1-7                                                                                                           | Continued dataset selection, aquisition, and import into R             | [Hypothesis testing](../lectures/slides/lecture-08-hypothesis-testing/)                     | Complete Data Readiness Check and submit.                           | [Analyzing Proportions](../lectures/slides/lecture-09-analyzing-proportions)                                                |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              | ABD Chapters 1-5                                                                                                       |                                                                        |                                                                                             | ::: {.alert .alert-warning}                                         |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             | **Due on D2L.** Project Data Readiness Check                        |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             | :::                                                                 |                                                                                                                             |
+---------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 6       | Feb 16-20    | [No Class]{.noclass}                                                                                                   | [Lab 7]{.lab}                                                          | [Lecture 9]{.lab}                                                                           | [Lab 8]{.lab}                                                       | [Lecture 10]{.lab}                                                                                                          |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              | Non-instructional Day                                                                                                  | [Analyzing Proportions](../labs/analyzing-proportions/)                | continued                                                                                   | [Transforming Data](../labs/transforming-data/)                     | [Fitting Probability Models to Frequency Data](../lectures/slides/lecture-10-fitting-probability-models-to-frequency-data/) |
+---------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 7       | Feb 23-27    | [Lecture 11]{.lab}                                                                                                     | [Lab 7]{.lab}                                                          | [No Class]{.noclass}                                                                        | [Project]{.lab}                                                     | [Lecture 11]{.lab}                                                                                                          |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              | [Using the Poisson Distribution to Test Randomness in Count Data](../lectures/slides/lecture-11-poisson-distribution/) | Independent Study time (finish Lab 7)                                  | Instructor at conference                                                                    | Independent Group Work on Project Abstract                          | Poisson distribution, continued                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        | Learning Assistants available to answer questions.                     |                                                                                             | Instructor at conference.                                           |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        | Instructor at conference.                                              |                                                                                             | ::: {.alert .alert-warning}                                         |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             | **Due on D2L.** Project Abstract Draft 1                            |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             | :::                                                                 |                                                                                                                             |
+---------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 8       | Mar 2-6      | [Lecture 12]{.lab}                                                                                                     | [Lab 9]{.lab}                                                          | [Exam 2]{.exam}                                                                             | [Lab 9]{.lab}                                                       | [Lecture 13]{.lab}                                                                                                          |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              | [Contingency Analysis (Lecture)](../lectures/slides/lecture-12-contingency-analysis/)                                  | [Contingency Analysis (Lab)](../labs/lab-09-contingency-analysis/)     | Lectures 8-12                                                                               | Contingency Analysis (Lab) continued                                | [The Normal Distribution](../lectures/slides/lecture-13-normal-distribution/)                                               |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        | ABD Chapters 6-9                                                                            |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
+---------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|         | Mar 9-13     | [No Class]{.noclass}                                                                                                   | [No Class]{.noclass}                                                   | [No Class]{.noclass}                                                                        | [No Class]{.noclass}                                                | [No Class]{.noclass}                                                                                                        |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              | *Spring break*                                                                                                         | *Spring break*                                                         | *Spring break*                                                                              | *Spring break*                                                      | *Spring break*                                                                                                              |
+---------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 9       | Mar 16-20    | [Lecture 14]{.lab}                                                                                                     | [Project]{.lab}                                                        | [Lecture 15]{.lab}                                                                          | [Project]{.lab}                                                     | [Lecture 16]{.lab}                                                                                                          |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              | [Inference for Population Means](../lectures/slides/lecture-14-t-tests-and-ci/)                                        | EDA Project work day                                                   | [Comparing Two Means](../lectures/slides/lecture-15-comparing-two-means/)                   | EDA Project work day                                                | [Handling Violations of Assumptions](../lectures/slides/lecture-16-handling-violations-of-assumptions)                      |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     | ::: {.alert .alert-warning}                                                                                                 |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     | **Due on D2L.**                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     | Project Abstract Draft 2                                                                                                    |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     | :::                                                                                                                         |
+---------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 10      | Mar 23-27    | [Lecture 16]{.lab}                                                                                                     | [Lab 10]{.lab}                                                         | [Lecture 17]{.lab}                                                                          | [Project]{.lab}                                                     | [Lecture 18]{.lab}                                                                                                          |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              | continued                                                                                                              | [$t$-tests](../labs/lab-10-t-tests/)                                   | [Choosing a Test](../lectures/slides/lecture-17-choosing-a-test/)                           | Data Analysis Check-In                                              | [Designing Experiments](../lectures/slides/lecture-18-designing-experiments/)                                               |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        | ::: {.alert .alert-warning}                                            | ::: {.alert .alert-warning}                                                                 |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        | **Deadline.**                                                          | **Deadline.**                                                                               |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        | SAC application deadline for BIOL 275 students                         | General SAC Application Deadline                                                            |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        | :::                                                                                         |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        | [SAC Application Instructions](sac-application-instructions.qmd)       |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        | :::                                                                    |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
+---------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 11      | Mar 30-Apr 3 | [Lecture 18]{.lab}                                                                                                     | [Lab 11]{.lab}                                                         | [Lecture 19]{.lab}                                                                          | [Project]{.lab}                                                     | [Lecture 19]{.lab}                                                                                                          |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              | Continued                                                                                                              | ANOVA                                                                  | Comparing more than two means                                                               | Activity: Project Analysis Check-In                                 | Continued                                                                                                                   |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        | ::: {.alert .alert-warning}                                                                 |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        | **Due on D2L.** Project Check-In Report.                                                    |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        | :::                                                                                         |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
+---------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 12      | Apr 6-10     | [No Class]{.noclass}                                                                                                   | [Lab 12 Correlation]{.lab}                                             | [Exam 3]{.exam}                                                                             | [Project]{.lab}                                                     | [Lecture 20]{.lab}                                                                                                          |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              | See D2L for homework assignment                                                                                        |                                                                        | Lectures 14-20                                                                              | ::: {.alert .alert-warning}                                         | Correlation between numerical variables                                                                                     |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             | **Due on D2L.** Project Poster Draft 1.                             |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        | ABD Chapters 10-15                                                                          | :::                                                                 |                                                                                                                             |
+---------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 13      | Apr 13-17    | [Lecture 21]{.lab}                                                                                                     | [Lab 13]{.lab}                                                         | [Lecture 21]{.lab}                                                                          | [Project]{.lab}                                                     | [Lecture 22]{.lab}                                                                                                          |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              | Regression (Lecture)                                                                                                   | Regression (Lab)                                                       | Continued                                                                                   | ::: {.alert .alert-warning}                                         | Analyzing multiple factors                                                                                                  |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             | **Due on D2L.** Project Poster Final Version.                       |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             | :::                                                                 |                                                                                                                             |
+---------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 14      | Apr 20-24    | [Lecture 22]{.lab}                                                                                                     | [Student Academic Conference]{.exam}                                   | [Lecture 23]{.lab}                                                                          | [Project]{.lab}                                                     | [Lecture 24]{.lab}                                                                                                          |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              | continued                                                                                                              |                                                                        |                                                                                             | Post-SAC Reflection                                                 |                                                                                                                             |
+---------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 15      | Apr 27-May 1 | [Lecture 25]{.lab}                                                                                                     | [Lab Practical Practice]{.lab}                                         | [Lecture 26]{.lab}                                                                          | [Lab Practical]{.lab}                                               | [Lecture 27]{.lab}                                                                                                          |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        | Optional practice for the lab practical                                |                                                                                             | Required Lab Practical during class                                 |                                                                                                                             |
+---------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 16      | May 4-8      | [Review]{.exam}                                                                                                        | [Final Exam]{.exam}                                                    | [No Class]{.noclass}                                                                        | [No Class]{.noclass}                                                | [No Class]{.noclass}                                                                                                        |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        |                                                                        |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              | Final Exam Review                                                                                                      | Tuesday, May 5\                                                        | Final Exam Week                                                                             | Final Exam Week                                                     | Final Exam Week                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        | 7:30-9:30 AM\                                                          |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
|         |              |                                                                                                                        | Langseth 104                                                           |                                                                                             |                                                                     |                                                                                                                             |
+---------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
